narrative:
Rush Township has 1,799 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.0%, a clear Republican lean of 9.5 percentage points.
